_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Sponge (SpongeForge)
author: support@phosphor.host
description: SpongeForge is the SpongeAPI implementation for Forge Loader.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# SpongeForge Installation Script
#
# SpongeForge is a Forge mod, not a standalone server, so a matching Forge
# server is installed and the SpongeForge jar is dropped into the mods folder.
# Everything else mirrors the SpongeVanilla egg: same install image
# (ghcr.io/ptero-eggs/installers:debian), same variables, same v2 download API.
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt update
# jq/curl ship with the image; openjdk is only needed to run the Forge installer
# (the installer and its processors are Java 8 bytecode, so any JRE works).
apt install -y jq curl openjdk-17-jdk-headless

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

API="https://dl-api.spongepowered.org/v2/groups/org.spongepowered/artifacts/spongeforge"

# Resolve the SpongeForge version to install
if [ -z "${SPONGE_VERSION}" ] || [ "${SPONGE_VERSION}" == "latest" ] || [ "${SPONGE_VERSION}" == "recommended" ]; then
  echo -e "Getting recommended SpongeForge version"
  SPONGE_VERSION=$(curl -s "${API}/versions?recommended=true&limit=1&offset=0" | jq -r '.artifacts | keys[0]')
  if [ -z "${SPONGE_VERSION}" ] || [ "${SPONGE_VERSION}" == "null" ]; then
    echo -e "No recommended build available, falling back to the newest version"
    SPONGE_VERSION=$(curl -s "${API}/versions?limit=1&offset=0" | jq -r '.artifacts | keys[0]')
  fi
fi

echo -e "Using SpongeForge version ${SPONGE_VERSION}"

# Pull the version metadata: Minecraft version, required Forge version and the
# download URL of the runnable mod jar (the "universal" classifier).
VERSION_DATA=$(curl -s "${API}/versions/${SPONGE_VERSION}")
MC_VERSION=$(echo "${VERSION_DATA}" | jq -r '.tags.minecraft')
FORGE_VERSION=$(echo "${VERSION_DATA}" | jq -r '.tags.forge')
SV_DL_LINK=$(echo "${VERSION_DATA}" | jq -r '.assets[]? | select(.classifier == "universal" and .extension == "jar") | .downloadUrl')

if [ -z "${SV_DL_LINK}" ] || [ "${SV_DL_LINK}" == "null" ] || [ -z "${FORGE_VERSION}" ] || [ "${FORGE_VERSION}" == "null" ]; then
  echo -e "ERROR: could not resolve SpongeForge version '${SPONGE_VERSION}'."
  echo -e "Check the version string against https://spongepowered.org/downloads/spongeforge"
  exit 1
fi

echo -e "Minecraft ${MC_VERSION}, Forge ${FORGE_VERSION}"

# --- Install the matching Forge server ---
FORGE_FULL="${MC_VERSION}-${FORGE_VERSION}"
DOWNLOAD_LINK="https://maven.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/${FORGE_FULL}/forge-${FORGE_FULL}-installer.jar"

echo -e "Downloading Forge installer from ${DOWNLOAD_LINK}"
if ! curl --output /dev/null --silent --head --fail "${DOWNLOAD_LINK}"; then
  echo -e "ERROR: Forge installer for ${FORGE_FULL} is not available."
  exit 2
fi
curl -s -o installer.jar -sS "${DOWNLOAD_LINK}"

# Clean any previous Forge args/libraries so up/downgrades work
rm -rf libraries/net/minecraftforge/forge
rm -f unix_args.txt

echo -e "Installing Forge server"
java -jar installer.jar --installServer || { echo -e "\nForge install failed for ${FORGE_FULL}. If memory is set to 0/unlimited, give the install some real memory."; exit 4; }
rm -f installer.jar

# Forge 1.17+ launches through generated JPMS args; symlink them for the egg startup
if ls libraries/net/minecraftforge/forge/*/unix_args.txt >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  ln -sf libraries/net/minecraftforge/forge/*/unix_args.txt unix_args.txt
else
  echo -e "ERROR: Forge unix_args.txt was not produced; SpongeForge requires Forge 1.17+."
  exit 5
fi

# --- Drop SpongeForge into the mods folder ---
mkdir -p mods
echo -e "Downloading SpongeForge ${SPONGE_VERSION} into mods/"
curl -s -o "mods/spongeforge-${SPONGE_VERSION}.jar" "${SV_DL_LINK}"

if [ ! -f server.properties ]; then
  echo -e "Downloading default server.properties"
  curl -s -o server.properties https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ptero-eggs/game-eggs/main/minecraft/java/server.properties
fi

echo -e "Install for SpongeForge is complete"

variables.name: Sponge Version
variables.description: SpongeForge version to install (e.g. 1.21.10-60.0.1-17.0.0), or "latest"/"recommended". Also determines which Forge version is installed.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the Jarfile to use when running SpongeVanilla.
